case_title: WEBCO GROUP, LLC VS. ESTHER MONTOYA ET AL

docket_entries.description: VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 73540648) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBCO GROUP, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, ESTHER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBCO GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTOYA, ESTHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 155 HAIGHT STREET, #103, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102; SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 73708728)
